subcodes.first_line: O thou who speakest forth in praise! In this vast expanse of the journey unto God, thou dost gallop like a steed in the arena of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثناء در این پهن فضای سیر و سلوک الی الله چون فارس میدان هدی جولانی
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @knowledge; recognition of God
